answer: Pacific-region gold loyalty shoppers on mobile web saw mobile checkout conversion drop on August 4, 2026 because variant B of exp-2026-q3-loyalty-wallet-accelerator reused household_id in the wallet eligibility cache instead of customer_profile_id, marking eligible linked profiles ineligible; remediation was to disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id.

facts.remediation: Disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id.
facts.root_cause: Loyalty wallet eligibility cache reused household_id across linked profiles, marking eligible profiles ineligible.
